text: Section 7: 30s—all in the form of leaked radio and television broadcasts. As chronicled in the 1997 film Contact, starring Jodie Foster and Matthew McConaughey, among the first and strongest broadcasts came from Hitler’s rallies in Nazi Germany. These signals have been traveling at the speed of light ever since they escaped Earth, filling an ever-expanding “radio-bubble” rich with information about our culture, social mores, and our treatment of one another.
